[← Back to Home](index.html){.back-button}

# Education

### Master of Business Administration (MBA)
University Canada West, Vancouver | Expected July 2026
- Currently pursuing MBA
- Focus: Business Administration

### Master of Data Analytics
University of Kelaniya, Sri Lanka | Completed September 2025
- Master's degree in Data Analytics

### Bachelor of Business Management (BBM)
University of Jaffna, Sri Lanka | Completed July 21, 2023
- Bachelor's degree in Business Management

## Professional Experience

### Administration Worker
Red Cross Society, Puttalam, Sri Lanka | 02/2020 – 01/2024
- Oversaw recruitment, hiring, onboarding, and staff training
- Managed employee relations, performance evaluations, and disciplinary actions
- Ensured different teams worked together effectively through collaboration and communication
- Provided assistance and support to executive leadership in decision-making, strategy, and operational planning
- Managed reception area as first point of contact for the public
- Assisted personnel with shared equipment through online booking system

### Social Worker
Red Cross Society, Puttalam, Sri Lanka | 01/2015 – 2020
- Ensured clients had access to resources, services, and rights
- Encouraged clients to take active role in addressing challenges, fostering self-sufficiency
- Provided emotional support and therapeutic interventions for mental health challenges, abuse, addiction, and trauma
- Assisted clients in coordinating care and connecting with community services
- Served as Basic First Aider and Psychosocial Supporter
